This command reads the contents of the file /work/secret/token and stores it in the variable $token.

Next, we'll use curl to make a GET request to http://api.internal/me, including the 'Authorization: Bearer <token>' header in the request.

The -s option suppresses the progress meter, -o /dev/null redirects the output to nowhere (since we're only interested in the status code), and -w "%{http_code}" writes the HTTP status code to the standard output.
